Body.Content:
We are announcing entity scoping in global search in Power Apps. This feature will reach public preview on August 7, 2026.

How does this affect me?
With this feature, users can now scope global search results by table in model-driven apps, allowing for narrowing of results to one or more relevant tables as needed.

What action do I need to take?
This message is for awareness, and no action is required.

message.Title: Power Apps - Entity scoping in global search
